query:
-- conflict_acknowledgments: owner acknowledges their own conflict
INSERT INTO conflict_acknowledgments (conflictId, orgId, dealId, acknowledgerOpenId, acknowledgerName, acknowledgedAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  1,
  'demo-summit-hvac',
  'HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD',
  'Los Silva',
  '2026-04-15 10:05:00'
);

-- audit_log: conflict.declare
INSERT INTO audit_log (orgId, actorOpenId, actorName, action, targetType, targetId, diff, summary, createdAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  'HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD',
  'Los Silva',
  'conflict.declare',
  'conflict',
  '1',
  '[{"field":"conflictType","before":null,"after":"financial"},{"field":"description","before":null,"after":"I have a prior business relationship with the seller''s broker (Summit Capital Advisors). We co-invested in a separate deal in 2023."},{"field":"dealId","before":null,"after":"demo-summit-hvac"}]',
  'Conflict declared on deal demo-summit-hvac',
  '2026-04-15 10:00:00'
);

-- audit_log: conflict.acknowledge
INSERT INTO audit_log (orgId, actorOpenId, actorName, action, targetType, targetId, diff, summary, createdAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  'HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD',
  'Los Silva',
  'conflict.acknowledge',
  'conflict',
  '1',
  '[{"field":"acknowledgedAt","before":null,"after":"2026-04-15T10:05:00.000Z"},{"field":"acknowledgerOpenId","before":null,"after":"HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD"}]',
  'Conflict acknowledged on deal demo-summit-hvac',
  '2026-04-15 10:05:00'
);
